title: eria tenuicaulis
intro: Eria tenuicaulis is a species of orchid native to the Western Ghats in India. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, with reported medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eria tenuicaulis are believed to include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Eria tenuicaulis is typically prepared as an herbal tea or decoction, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
